description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

The "Hanno City Living Guide 2026" (published in April 2026 / Reiwa 8) contained some omissions. Below are additional medical and health facilities that should have been included.

【Pharmacies】 Planned for page 67
• Heart Pharmacy Hanno Okawara Branch
  Address: Okawara 935-3
  Phone: 980-5195

【Treatment Facilities】 Planned for page 69
• Mura Osteopathic Clinic
  Address: Kawadera 46-3
  Services: Judo therapy (柔道整復)
  Phone: 911-9616

• Mura Acupuncture and Moxibustion Clinic
  Address: Kawadera 46-3
  Services: Acupuncture and moxibustion
  Phone: 911-9616

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/13487.html
summary: ℹ️ Additions to the Hanno City Living Guide 2026
